positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a soaring majestic mountain owl perched on a sleek, stylized branch. The owl is depicted in a powerful silhouette against a dramatic celestial background featuring deep indigo and gradient turquoise hues. The composition is centered, with strong lines and negative space emphasizing the owl's form. Abstract cosmic nebula elements swirl subtly around the branch, suggesting magic and freedom. Clean lines, high contrast, graphic novel style, suitable for textile printing, vector art quality, deep saturation, perfect symmetry, 2D art.
negative: blur, noise, low quality, realistic photo, painting, signature, watermark, logo, text, bad anatomy, deformed, cropped, extra limbs
